name: Sorbetto Di Pesca Bianca (White Peach Sorbet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the peaches, then peel them and chop coarsely, removing the pit.
2. Put the peaches and sugar in a food processor; blend until liquefied.
3. Add the lemon juice and blend for a few seconds longer.
4. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
